title: Pruritus without rash
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting onset, duration, localisation, generalisation, time course, intensity, triggers, associated symptoms, medicines, exposures, personal and family history, whole skin, scalp, nails, oral and anogenital examination, and primary versus secondary lesions.

source.title: European Guideline on Chronic Pruritus: In cooperation with the European Dermatology Forum (EDF)
source.jurisdiction: European international specialty guidance requiring UAE adaptation
source.population: Adults with chronic pruritus, including dermatologic, systemic, neurologic, psychiatric, drug-related, pregnancy, and older-person contexts.
source.setting: Primary care, dermatology, and multidisciplinary assessment of chronic pruritus.
source.exclusions: Exact for a structured itch history, whole-skin examination, primary versus secondary lesion documentation, contextual review, and clinician-selected investigation documentation. It does not diagnose a cause or generate tests or treatment.

exact_location.heading: Section 5.1 — patient history and clinical examination

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting onset, duration, localisation, generalisation, time course, intensity, triggers, associated symptoms, medicines, exposures, personal and family history, whole skin, scalp, nails, oral and anogenital examination, and primary versus secondary lesions.

assessment.text: Supports recording laboratory or other results already available and clinician-selected investigation context according to history and examination; it does not generate a test panel.
